evidence: TASK-035 (FEAT-006 T2, base-stamping) verified. Commit fa4e7fd wires the dormant content-addressed object store into both baseline-write sites in index.ts: installContext baseline loop (putObject(destRoot, content_hash, schemaJson), reusing the already-parsed body + already-computed content_hash) and the updateContext baseline-refresh (TASK-034 site, inside the !dryRun guard, keyed by the new content_hash). adoptConception is correctly not a site; checkStatus and the installed_from.assets shape (context.ts:79) are untouched (purely additive, Option B from R-0008). Real-substrate tests (install-subcommand.test.ts, tsx --test against source): 'base-stamps each installed schema body under its baseline content_hash' (install round-trip: getObject by the baseline content_hash returns a body whose computeContentHash equals it) and '(b2) a resync base-stamps the resynced schema body under its NEW refreshed baseline content_hash' both pass; the dry-run test extended to assert objects/ gains no entry under updateContext({dryRun:true}). build+check+test green (pi-context 36, fail 0). Fresh-context adversarial probe: PASS, no defects (own harness round-tripped 2 assets; dryRun stamped nothing by independent before/after snapshot; checkStatus byte-identical by construction; install-site put inside the per-schema try/catch; idempotent + content-addressed, no collision; asset shape unchanged). The merge consuming this base is TASK-036.

criteria_results.criterion: every install/update writes the as-installed schema body to the object store via putObject keyed by the asset's recorded content_hash; installed_from.assets shape unchanged (no context.ts:79 type change)
criteria_results.evidence: two putObject sites (install + update-refresh) keyed by the same content_hash written to assets[name]; asset shape unchanged

criteria_results.evidence: test + independent adversarial harness: every asset round-trips (computeContentHash(body) === content_hash)
